text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's, and we decide to visit a shrine to
make a wish for success in Biwa Hayahide's
coming senior races.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it's already a new year. Time sure
does fly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
By the way, did you watch the Asahi Hai F.S. last
month?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide participated in that G1 before. It's
one of the races that determines the junior year
champion.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I heard Narita Brian took first in it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Time really does go by quickly. She's a classic
racer already.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It might even be as soon as this year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide takes a deep breath and lets it out
as if she's steeling herself for something. Then,
she turns to me again.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The battle between Brian and me might be as
soon as this year.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We need to start gathering data on Brian right
away. I doubt she'll stop with the Classic Triple
Crown tour.
choice_data_list: We need to be ready to beat her.
We need to be ready to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Exactly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the line's moving. We'd better start thinking
about what we want to pray for.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What will you ask for this year, Trainer?
choice_data_list: For us to improve your abilities so you can win.
For us to polish up your technique.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're praying for my sake and not your own?
You really prioritize us racers over yourself too
much.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why don't we drink some amazake after we're done praying? We can do a little New Year's toast to both our health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I enjoy the start of the new year with
Biwa Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're right. That's something we need to
work on together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's do some training when we get back, so we
can make that wish of yours come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Biwa Hayahide and I get started training
from the very first day of the new year.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm, my technique? I feel like you already help me
enough with my running skills...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I love that you never get complacent. I'll take
a leaf out of your book and pray for the same,
then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I spend a nice start to the new year with
Biwa Hayahide.
